ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (1-male, 0-female) */,
  "admit_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was discharged */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the patient */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the patient */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 code for the diagnosis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who made the diagnosis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being prescribed the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was ended */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the result is recorded */,
  "lab_test" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory test (e.g., cholesterol, glucose) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the laboratory test */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result (e.g., mmol/L, mg/dL) */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the laboratory test */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who ordered the test */,
  "test_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_results_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vital_signs" (
  "vital_sign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vital sign record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the vital signs are recorded */,
  "vital_sign_date" TEXT /* Date the vital signs were recorded */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "heart_rate" TEXT /* Heart rate of the patient */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature of the patient */,
  "oxygen_saturation" TEXT /* Oxygen saturation of the patient */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who recorded the vital signs */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the vital signs were recorded */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or observations about the vital signs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vital_sign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electrocardiograms" (
  "ecg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ECG */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the ECG is recorded */,
  "ecg_date" TEXT /* Date the ECG was recorded */,
  "heart_rate" TEXT /* Heart rate of the patient */,
  "rhythm" TEXT /* Rhythm of the ECG (e.g., normal, abnormal) */,
  "axis" TEXT /* Axis of the ECG (e.g., normal, left) */,
  "intervals" TEXT /* Intervals of the ECG (e.g., PR, QRS, QT) */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who recorded the ECG */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the ECG was recorded */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or observations about the ECG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electrocardiograms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electrocardiograms_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_tests" (
  "exercise_test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the exercise test is recorded */,
  "exercise_test_date" TEXT /* Date the exercise test was performed */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the exercise test */,
  "exercise_type" TEXT /* Type of exercise performed (e.g., treadmill, stationary bike) */,
  "heart_rate" TEXT /* Heart rate of the patient during the exercise test */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the patient during the exercise test */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who ordered the exercise test */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the exercise test was performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or observations about the exercise test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_tests_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heart_rate_monitoring" (
  "hrm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heart rate monitoring record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the heart rate monitoring is recorded */,
  "hrm_date" TEXT /* Date the heart rate monitoring was performed */,
  "heart_rate" TEXT /* Heart rate of the patient */,
  "rhythm" TEXT /* Rhythm of the heart rate monitoring (e.g., normal, abnormal) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the heart rate monitoring */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who performed the heart rate monitoring */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the heart rate monitoring was performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or observations about the heart rate monitoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hrm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heart_rate_monitoring_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heart_rate_monitoring_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patient data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecg_abnormalities" (
  "abnormality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ECG abnormality */,
  "ecg_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ECG the abnormality is associated with */,
  "abnormality_type" TEXT /* Type of abnormality (e.g., arrhythmia, conduction disorder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the abnormality */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who identified the abnormality */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the abnormality (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abnormality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecg_abnormalities_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecg_abnormalities_ecg_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecg_id") REFERENCES electrocardiograms ("ecg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise test result */,
  "exercise_test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise test the result is associated with */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was obtained */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the exercise test */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result (e.g., mmol/L, mg/dL) */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the exercise test */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who reviewed the results */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or observations about the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_test_results_exercise_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_test_id") REFERENCES exercise_tests ("exercise_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_test_results_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
